title: Automation for moving subitems to parent item by matching names
excerpt:

posts.author: Dharvina (Dharvina)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Please add an automation that enables subitems to be automatically reassigned to a parent item when their names match or when certain conditions/customized rules are satisfied. This will streamline project management and support advanced workflows where subitems often arrive separately from parent items.

What are you trying to achieve

I want subitems to be automatically moved to the correct parent item on the board based on matching item names or custom matching rules, reducing manual work and errors.

posts.author: workflowboost (Bartosz @ Workflow Boost)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Dharvina ,

Are you looking to change the parent based on the current parent name or the subitem name? What are the example conditions you’re looking for?

In our Subitems Pro Automations app, we have a few automations for changing subitems’ parent, and we’re open to adding ones exactly matching your case.

This is the existing automation you might find useful:

image548×524 25 KB

Here is a list of all other automations for subitem parent change: Automations by Category | Apps Documentation

If you have access to workflows, you can use the following custom block to change the parent:

image1774×858 68.1 KB
